title: Apply before the test? A decision guide for prospective NZ citizens
excerpt: Anyone who applies for citizenship before late 2027 will not have to sit the new test. Here's a clear way to decide whether to apply now or wait.

title: How the new NZ citizenship test works
excerpt: What to expect on test day: booking, the test centre, the 45 minutes, getting your result, and what happens if you need a re-attempt.

title: Who is exempt from the NZ citizenship test?
excerpt: Children, older applicants, and people using certain pathways are exempt. The full list, with a self-check guide and explanations for each category.
